---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea, new job source, or parser for JobScout-AI.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, feature
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 Feature Request

### 🔍 Category
- [ ] New Job Source / Scraper Adapter
- [ ] Resume Parser / Pydantic Schema Enhancement
- [ ] UI / Dashboard Improvement
- [ ] LLM Router / Resiliency Feature
- [ ] Other

---

### Description
Provide a clear and concise description of the feature request.

### Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve for job hunters or contributors?

### 🛠️ Proposed Implementation Details
If suggesting a new **Job Source / Scraper Adapter**:
- **Source Domain:** [e.g., greenhouse.io, remote.co]
- **API Availability:** [Yes / No / Unknown] (Does it have public RSS feeds, API endpoints, or requires Playwright?)
- **Scraper approach:** [JobSpy integration / Custom HTML Parser]

If suggesting another feature:
- Describe how the code should be structured (e.g., views, tasks, adapters).

### Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

### Additional Context
Add any other context, mockup screenshots, or documentation links here.
